steps.title: Find the location in the passage
steps.content: The passage states the National Association of Black Journalists "was founded in Washington, DC, in 1975." The question asks directly where it was founded.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choices A (Philadelphia), B (Detroit), and D (San Diego) are not mentioned in the passage. Only Washington, DC is named as the founding location.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
